heading: Technical training for private sector development in Poland and Hungary
label: 5423 Technical training for private sector development in Poland and Hungary

children.heading: Technical training program
children.label: a Technical training program
children.text: The Agency for International Development shall develop and implement a program for extending basic agribusiness, commercial, entrepreneurial, financial, scientific, and technical skills to the people of Poland and Hungary to enable them to better meet their needs and develop a market economy. This program shall include management training and agricultural extension activities.

children.heading: Participation by Enterprise Funds and other agencies and organizations
children.label: b Participation by Enterprise Funds and other agencies and organizations

children.text: the Farmer-to-Farmer Program under section 1736(a)(1) and (2) of title 7;
the Foundation for the Development of Polish Agriculture;
the World Council of Credit Unions; and
other United States, Polish, and Hungarian private and voluntary organizations and private sector entities.

children.heading: Nonapplicability of other provisions of law
children.label: c Nonapplicability of other provisions of law
children.text: Assistance provided pursuant to subsection (a) under the authorities of part I of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 [ et seq.] may be provided notwithstanding any other provision of law.22 U.S.C. 2151

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: For purposes of implementing this section, there are authorized to be appropriated $10,000,000 for the 3-year period beginning , to carry out chapter 1 of part I of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 ( and following; relating to development assistance), in addition to amounts otherwise available for such purposes.October 1, 198922 U.S.C. 2151

children.heading: Limitation with respect to Farmer-to-Farmer Program
children.label: e Limitation with respect to Farmer-to-Farmer Program
children.text: Any activities carried out pursuant to this chapter through the Farmer-to-Farmer Program under section 1736(a)(1) and (2) of title 7 shall be funded with funds authorized to be appropriated by this chapter and local currencies made available under , and shall not be funded with funds made available pursuant to section 1107 of the Food Security Act of 1985 ( note) or a similar, subsequent provision of law.section 5425 of this title7 U.S.C. 1736
